name: chain__i_set_up_6_ai_agents_that_sell_web_serv
method:
i set up 6 ai agents that sell web services 24/7 (full breakdown) i know "ai agents" sounds like tech bro nonsense so let me explain it simply.

ai agent is just an ai that does a specific task on it

stages.task: Scrape GMB, Yelp, Google Maps for businesses with no website or PageSpeed < 30. Use local_biz_website_scraper.py pattern
Score leads 1-10 on: has revenue signals, industry margins, website quality gap, contact info available
Generate personalized cold email with free mini-audit (PageSpeed score, mobile issues, SEO gaps) as hook. Use claude -p for personalization
Auto-respond to replies using procedural memory sales scripts. Handle: too expensive, need to think, already have someone, can you do cheaper
Generate website mockup or SEO audit report using claude -p + HTML templates. Deliver via email as PDF
3-7-14 day followup cadence for non-responders. Value-add each touchpoint (new insight about their site)
